name: Bell Pepper Curry
recipeIngredient: Optional: peanuts, chana dal, urad dal - this makes it crunchy
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a pan until smoking.
2. Add mustard seeds and stir until they sputter.
3. Add cumin seeds (optional dals, peanuts, asafoetida).
4. Drop the peppers into the pan.
5. Add turmeric, chili powder, and salt.
6. Saute until the peppers are slightly tender.
7. Stir in chick-pea flour and cook until a golden brown crust forms.
8. Serve hot with dal and rice.
